nl_query: Show all scripts where the primary evaluator has frozen the attempt, a review evaluator has been assigned, but the review attempt has not yet started, including the primary evaluator name, review evaluator name, and board code.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id, a.urn, ea1.evaluator_user_id AS primary_evaluator_user_id, ea2.evaluator_user_id AS review_evaluator_user_id, b.code AS board_code, au1.display_name AS primary_evaluator_name, au2.display_name AS review_evaluator_name
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa1 ON sa1.script_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea1 ON ea1.assignment_id = sa1.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc1 ON fc1.employee_id = ea1.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   app_user au1 ON au1.id = fc1.employee_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa2 ON sa2.script_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea2 ON ea2.assignment_id = sa2.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc2 ON fc2.employee_id = ea2.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   app_user au2 ON au2.id = fc2.employee_id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = a.course_id
WHERE  ea1.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND ea1.status = 'FROZEN' AND ea1.is_active = TRUE
  AND  ea2.attempt_type = 'REVIEW' AND ea2.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' AND ea2.is_active = TRUE
ORDER  BY a.id ASC
LIMIT  500;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.code. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
